# Continuous build Changelog

- [e23e6a3](https://github.com/Zuljita/DungeonsOnAutomatic/commit/e23e6a3cc41e6997fd66796952c4ce5409c2dea0) Add deterministic CER calculator and ignore local GCS fixtures.

- [604839c](https://github.com/Zuljita/DungeonsOnAutomatic/commit/604839c434466d85d40c65f08b74c323ce6d1bdd) Add GCS-derived DF3/DFRPG ancestry packages for dungeon NPCs.
